metadata.name: KRL Bogor Line Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
metadata.source_name: KAI Commuter official website schedule API
limitations: Local-only app data; not cleared for redistribution or deployment.
Schedule license and reuse terms are unknown.
OpenStreetMap geometry is ODbL-licensed and attribution/share-alike obligations are not configured for deployment.
Source is website API schedule JSON, not a GTFS feed.
Only full Bogor to Jakarta Kota and Jakarta Kota to Bogor terminal services are included.
Terminal departure and arrival times use sourced KCI API rows.
Intermediate stop times are derived by scaling representative official train-schedule offsets to each sourced terminal runtime.
Trips and calendars are locally derived and are not official GTFS service records.

metadata.name: KRL Tangerang Line Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
metadata.source_name: KAI Commuter official website schedule API
metadata.license: schedule waived for local use; OSM geometry ODbL
limitations: Schedule reuse terms waived by the project owner for local use only.
Station coordinates are from OpenStreetMap and require ODbL attribution before redistribution.
Source is website API schedule JSON, not a GTFS feed.
Only full Tangerang to Duri and Duri to Tangerang terminal services are included.
Intermediate stop times are scaled from a representative official train schedule.
Calendar validity dates are not provided by the source.

metadata.name: KRL Cikarang Line Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
metadata.source_name: KAI Commuter official website schedule API
metadata.license: schedule waived for local use; OSM geometry ODbL
limitations: Schedule reuse waived by the owner for local use only.
Station coordinates and track geometry from OpenStreetMap (ODbL).
Source is website API schedule JSON, not a GTFS feed.
Modeled as the main Cikarang-Angke service; loop variants (via Manggarai/Pasar Senen) are simplified.
Intermediate stop times scaled from a representative official train schedule.

metadata.name: LRT Jabodebek Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
metadata.source_name: LRT Jabodebek official website departure schedule
limitations: Local-only app data; not cleared for redistribution or deployment.
Schedule license and reuse terms are unknown.
OpenStreetMap geometry is ODbL-licensed and attribution/share-alike obligations are not configured for deployment.
Source is station-level weekday/holiday departure tables, not a GTFS feed.
Official trip IDs and destination labels are not exposed by the source page.
Outbound Dukuh Atas departures are split evenly between the Bekasi and Cibubur branches for visualization.
Intermediate stop times are interpolated from official approximate route runtimes.
Trips and calendars are locally derived and are not official GTFS service records.

metadata.name: LRT Jakarta Schedule Candidate (Local Only)
metadata.source_name: LRT Jakarta public website schedule form
limitations: Local-only app data; not cleared for redistribution or deployment.
Schedule license and reuse terms are unknown.
OpenStreetMap geometry is ODbL-licensed and attribution/share-alike obligations are not configured for deployment.
Source is terminal departure lists from a public schedule form, not a GTFS feed.
Intermediate station stop times are uniformly interpolated at three minutes per segment for visualization.
Trips and calendars are locally derived and are not official GTFS service records.

metadata.name: MRT Jakarta Station Timetable Candidate (Local Only)
metadata.source_name: MRT Jakarta official website station timetable API
limitations: Local-only app data; not cleared for redistribution or deployment.
License and reuse terms are unknown.
Source is station-level timetable strings, not a GTFS feed.
Trip identities are locally derived by greedy time-sequence matching within each direction.
Short-start and short-ending services are inferred from unassigned station departures.
Calendar validity dates are not provided by the source.

metadata.name: TransJakarta Official GTFS Candidate (Local Only)
limitations: Local-only app data; not cleared for redistribution or deployment.
License and reuse terms are unknown.
No feed_info.txt license metadata is present in the cached feed.
Other operators still use manual fallback sample data.

metadata.name: Commuter Line Basoetta Schedule Candidate
metadata.source_name: KAI Commuter official Commuter Line Basoetta timetable
metadata.license: official timetable and Jakarta Satu geometry; local use only, attribution preserved
limitations: Timetable normalized from the official PDF effective 2025-09-01.
Calendar-date exceptions are not modeled by this app; rows with September 2025 date exclusions are included.
6 timetable rows include source PDF date-exclusion notes.
Geometry comes from Jakarta Satu RITJ Jalur KRL layer feature 'Soetta Line'.
